commit_message: mandatory allowed hosts for secure URLs

pr_description:
- [x] Updated the grafana plugin SDK from v0.193.0 to v0.197.0
- [x] Added support for variables in the backend parser root selector ( previously interpolation was not handled for `rootSelector` property )
- [x] Fixed a bug where variable values were not passed with the nested variable queries ( passed `scopedVars` to `metricFindQuery` method )
- [x] Better support for variable handling when variable queries have more than 1 column ( Addes support for `__text` and `__value` kind of variable support similar to [mysql/postgres](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/datasources/mysql/#query-variable)

- [x] This PR migrates the build tooling from `@grafana/toolkit` to `@grafana/plugin-tools`.
- [x] This PR also sets the minimum supported Grafana version to 9.5.15 from 8.4.7
